caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a black, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones, sitting behind a professional silver condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm. In the initial sequence, the man speaks while touching his face with his right hand, gesturing near his mouth. As the sequence progresses, he lowers his hand and looks toward someone or something off-camera to his right. His expression shifts from a serious speaking demeanor to a slight smile and then a full laugh, showing his teeth. His white t-shirt features a small black graphic on the chest with the words "Stay" and "Positive" stacked vertically. Throughout the clip, his posture remains relatively stable as he reacts to an interaction occurring outside the frame.
